<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="0.8" border="100"> <diagram name="Notiflow Full Architecture" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="1717" dy="2635" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="1700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1" value="User Dashboard
- Voice Input
- Dashboard
- Alerts UI" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="390" y="-50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="docker" parent="1" style="rounded=1;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontStyle=1;fontSize=25;" value="Docker Network (notiflow_network)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="700" width="1240" x="70" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="app" parent="docker" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1" value="Django App
Voice Processing
- AI Integration
- Notification Logic" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="129.23076923076923" width="272.8" x="287.20000000000005" y="100.00076923076922" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="postgres" parent="docker" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1" value="PostgreSQL
- Users
- Reminders
- Notifications
- History" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="129.23076923076923" width="272.8" x="30.000000000000004" y="370.0023076923077" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="redis" parent="docker" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1" value="Redis
- Broker
- Queue
- Cache" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="107.6923076923077" width="248.00000000000003" x="335.20000000000005" y="344.6130769230769" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker" parent="docker" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1" value="Celery Worker
- Email Tasks
- SMS sending
- Notification Trigger
- Retry Logic" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150.76923076923077" width="310" x="830.8000000000001" y="323.07692307692304" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="beat" parent="docker" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fontFamily=Helvetica;" value="Celery Beat- 
Scheduler- 
- Weekly analytics
 - emailFailed job retries 
with exponential backoff
- Reminder cleanup and archival" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160.77" width="310" x="820.0000000000001" y="99.99999999999999" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flower" parent="docker" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1" value="Flower Dashboard
- Monitor Queue
- Worker Status
- Debug Tasks" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="107.6923076923077" width="248.00000000000003" x="330.00000000000006" y="539.9992307692307" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c2" edge="1" parent="docker" source="app" style="endArrow=block;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1" target="postgres" value="CRUD Operations
(Reminders, Users)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.301" y="-21" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c3" edge="1" parent="docker" source="app" style="endArrow=block;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1" target="redis" value="Push Async Tasks
(Celery Broker)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c4" edge="1" parent="docker" source="redis" style="endArrow=block;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1" target="worker" value="Task Queue Consumption"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c5" edge="1" parent="docker" style="endArrow=block;entryX=0.968;entryY=0.928;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1" target="postgres" value="Update Status
(Store Results)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2051" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="831" y="460" /> <mxPoint x="450" y="480" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="830" y="460" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="297.6000000000001" y="464.81692307692356" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c6" edge="1" parent="docker" source="beat" style="endArrow=block;exitX=0.016;exitY=0.92;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;entryX=0.957;entryY=0.025;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="redis" value="Schedule Tasks
(Push Jobs)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="657.2000000000002" y="340" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c7" edge="1" parent="docker" source="flower" style="endArrow=open;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1" target="redis" value="Monitor Queue"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.609" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c8" edge="1" parent="docker" source="flower" style="endArrow=open;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;exitX=0.988;exitY=0.092;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="worker" value="Monitor Workers"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="986" y="549" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="830.8000000000001" y="470" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="twilio" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1" value="Twilio API

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: #ffffff; white-space: nowrap;
